---
name: Feature request / mod balance
about: If you want the mod to have new features or just balance the existing contents
title: "[Feature] Contents balance"
labels: enhancement
assignees: BackNNHH, Hao-1337

---

> [!NOTE]
> If you are able to implement this feature yourself, consider submitting a [Pull Request](https://github.com/Hao-1337/mindustry-better-vanilla/pulls) instead of opening a feature request.

## About feature or problem
Is your feature request related to a problem?
Describe the problem clearly and concisely.

**Example:**
> I'm frustrated because [...]

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or behavior you would like to see added.
Include as much detail as possible about how you expect it to work.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions, workarounds, or approaches you have considered.

## Use Case
Explain why this feature would be useful.
What problem does it solve, and who would benefit from it?

## Checklist
Before submitting, please confirm:
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this feature has not already been requested.
- [ ] This request is not a duplicate of an existing feature request.
- [ ] I have provided enough information to explain the use case and expected behavior.
